title: galium rupestre
intro: Galium rupestre, also known as Rough Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Galium rupestre can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
